```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="message-circle" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">passive</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Assistants</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.6em;">You speak. It answers.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.25em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;">ChatGPT</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;">Claude.ai</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;">Gemini</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="settings" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">active</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Agents</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.6em;">Runs shells. Edits files. Picks next.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.25em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#C4881A;">Codex</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#C4881A;">Claude Code</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#C4881A;">Gemini CLI</span>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;text-align:center;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;font-weight:700;">
  <span style="color:#2C8475;">Assistants answer.</span>&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="color:#C4881A;">Agents act.</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
